CustomField.description: Chain-of-custody status for FRA sponsor-prepared documents. Agency Original: no sponsor involvement. Sponsor Draft: uploaded by the project sponsor portal user, not yet reviewed. Agency Under Review: assigned to an agency reviewer. Agency Modified: agency made substantive edits. Agency Adopted: agency independently evaluated and formally adopted the document per FRA requirements. History tracking enabled — the transition from Sponsor Draft to Agency Adopted is the key APA defensibility record.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Custody status of this document. Sponsor Draft documents must reach Agency Adopted before use in the official administrative record.
CustomField.label: Document Custody Status
